title: fix(desktop): validate practice metrics slugs

codeRecommendation.reason: The metrics store now rejects path-separator traversal slugs, canonicalizes accepted slugs before return/storage, and skips malformed local metric filenames without breaking valid metrics.

shipRecommendation.reason: This is a narrow local-data integrity and filesystem-boundary fix. It should ship with the functional-labs train once Sebastian accepts the PR, but it does not require a standalone release cut.

bugsFixedByCodexReview: PracticeMetricsStore.list() could throw on malformed local filenames after the original validator was added.
Whitespace-padded accepted slugs were not consistently canonicalized in returned and stored metric records.
Regression coverage now proves traversal rejection, canonical accepted slugs, and malformed local-file skip behavior.

proof.screenshotReason: Backend/local filesystem behavior; data proof is the relevant evaluation artifact.
